description.short: Set personal, chat, and channel reminders in Teams.
description.full: Never miss meetings, tasks, or birthdays with one-off and recurring reminders, timezone-aware scheduling, and proactive meeting nudges.

commands.title: remind
commands.description: Create one-off or recurring reminders using natural language

commands.title: list
commands.description: View reminders for this personal, chat, or channel context

commands.title: complete
commands.description: Mark a reminder complete by index
